idx_coa_upcoming_leads.name: idx_coa_upcoming_leads
idx_coa_upcoming_leads.where: (((decision)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['Approved'::character varying, 'Approved with Conditions'::character varying])::text[])) AND (linked_permit_num IS NULL))

public.mv_monthly_permit_stats.name: mv_monthly_permit_stats
public.mv_monthly_permit_stats.definition: SELECT date_trunc('month'::text, issued_date::timestamp with time zone)::date AS month, permit_type, count(*)::integer AS permit_count, COALESCE(sum(est_const_cost), 0::numeric)::bigint AS total_value FROM permits WHERE issued_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY (date_trunc('month'::text, issued_date::timestamp with time zone)), permit_type
